---
name: Mod Submission
about: Submit a JS or CSS mod to be included in the Mod Manager store
title: "[MOD] "
labels: mod-submission
assignees: ''
---

**Mod name**

**Author**

**Description**
<!-- One or two sentences shown on the mod card in the store -->

**Type**
<!-- js / css / both -->

**Jellyfin compatibility**
<!-- e.g. 10.10+, 10.11+ -->

**Source repository**

**JS URL**
<!-- Direct link to the JS file, if applicable. GitHub raw or jsDelivr CDN preferred. -->

**CSS URL**
<!-- Direct link to the CSS file, if applicable. GitHub raw or jsDelivr CDN preferred. -->

**Preview image URL**
<!-- A 16:9 screenshot hosted in your repo or on imgur -->

**Tags**
<!-- Pick from: ui, player, video, home, cards, minimal, artwork, badges, animations, css, developer -->

---

**Checklist**

- [ ] JS/CSS is hosted at a stable, public URL
- [ ] Mod works on Jellyfin 10.10 or 10.11
- [ ] Mod works without additional dependencies or local files
- [ ] Source repository is publicly accessible
